title: hearth.session.completed v1
description: Emitted by hearth-nbus when a Claude Code session finishes. Tracks aggregate session stats (turns, messages, duration, cost) and the file set modified so hearth-loom can drive post-session automation (bead creation, bench, promotion). Fires once per session termination.

session_id.description: ULID of the session that just completed.

project.description: Absolute path of the project the session was running in.

branch.description: Git branch name active for this session (if known).

current_task.description: The bead/task ID the session was working on, if any.

total_turns.description: Number of request/response round-trips in this session.

cost_usd.description: Billed cost in US dollars for this session.

modified_files.description: List of file paths modified during the session.
